overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street at dusk. The player moves along a sidewalk past towering skyscrapers with large holographic billboards, occasionally looking up at the buildings and observing passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with corporate towers

events.description: dark sedan passes by on the right side of the road
white van drives past on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the street and illuminated buildings

notable_agents.action: sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall dark corporate building with illuminated signage that cycles through different names
decorative illuminated archway spanning the street ahead
modern street lamp post with bright white light
multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic city at dusk, with the Arasaka Studios building on the left featuring changing illuminated signage. The street ahead features the Jinguji archway, while vehicles occasionally pass by on the right. The scene is lit by neon signs and street lamps against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open view of skyscrapers against evening sky

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and billboards
view transitions from neon-lit street level to natural dusk sky backdrop

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to view the towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards against the sky

entered.detail: large blue holographic billboard with medical branding visible against the sky
deep blue evening sky with scattered clouds visible between towers

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the massive scale of the surrounding skyscrapers against the deep blue dusk sky. The Asclepius billboard glows prominently among the tower lights, while the natural sky provides a contrasting backdrop to the artificial neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with large fashion billboard and passing traffic

events.description: camera tilts back down to street level and resumes walking
yellow sports car speeds past closely on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the sidewalk, passing the large AVANTE fashion billboard

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding past on the road

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying fashion advertisement with embracing couple
illuminated corporate signage on the right side buildings

segments.scene_description: Returning to street level, the camera continues walking past the towering AVANTE fashion billboard on the left. A yellow sports car speeds by on the right, and the Nokota corporate signage is visible on the distant buildings ahead. The scene maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approach to covered overpass with dense advertisements

events.description: moving from open sidewalk toward the covered overpass structure
white sports car drives toward and passes under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the road edge toward the overpass, passing close to moving traffic

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving toward the overpass ahead

entered.detail: lower portion of billboard structure displaying text NEW LOOK JADE TOKYO
covered bridge structure spanning the road ahead with support beams

segments.scene_description: Approaching the covered overpass, the camera moves closer to the road where vehicles pass by frequently. The New Look Jade Tokyo text becomes visible on the lower left billboard section, while the overpass structure looms ahead. The AVANTE billboard recedes into the distance as the enclosed bridge entrance dominates the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving along a neon-lit urban sidewalk that eventually shifts its focus toward the towering heights of a futuristic skyline. It begins with a walk past the Arasaka Studios building, where illuminated signage flickers on the left while the Jinguji archway looms ahead and vehicles glide by on the right. As the camera progresses through the glow of street lamps and neon signs against the darkening dusk, the perspective gradually tilts upward. This movement expands the view from the concrete street to the massive scale of surrounding skyscrapers set against a deep blue sky. The scene finally settles on the glowing Asclepius billboard, contrasting the artificial brilliance of the city lights with the natural backdrop of the evening sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a neon-lit city sidewalk that transitions from an open street view into the shadow of a covered overpass. It begins by walking past a towering AVANTE fashion billboard on the left as a yellow sports car speeds by on the right, with Nokota corporate signage visible on the distant skyline. As the camera advances, the open street begins to narrow, and the New Look Jade Tokyo text emerges on a lower billboard section. The scene then shifts as the AVANTE billboard recedes into the distance, allowing the massive structure of the enclosed bridge entrance to loom ahead and dominate the view.
